benefits.description: Used for post-surgical healing following 3 shoulder surgeries and hip surgery. Combined Mod29/Ipamorelin and BPC for healing. Last surgery in 2020 combined the peptides. BPC helped especially.
Ipamorelin and Mod29 increase pulsitile GH for healing

protocol_notes: Source: X Peptides (Canada). Prepared a week's worth of BPC, Mod29, and Ipamorelin to inject pre-surgery, then reconstituted after. Used BPC and TB-500 for glute tendonosis. For last surgery (2020), did not use pain killers initially - used 6-day block, then ibuprofen 800, maybe dilaudid for couple days, then ibuprofen at night. After ~10 days used nothing for pain. User has been ordering from X Peptides for many years and has never had issues. Shipping takes 3 days from shipping day (usually Wednesday). Contact: info@xpeptides.com
